articles.title: Jackky recalls being body-shamed, was Yokozuna, his father refused to launch him
articles.description: Actor-producer Jackky Bhagnani bravely shared his past struggles with severe body image issues and relentless bullying. He recounted hurtful childhood remarks, including being compared to a wrestler, which deeply impacted his self-esteem. Bhagnani also revealed his father's honest initial reaction to his acting aspirations, which ultimately spurred him towards a healthier lifestyle.

articles.description: Gram Chikitsalay Season 2 follows Dr. Prabhat's continued efforts to revive Bhathkandi's struggling Primary Health Center amid mounting challenges. As he earns the villagers' trust, he discovers that rural healthcare demands far more than medical knowledge alone.

articles.description: Kangana Ranaut mourned the passing of veteran filmmaker Pahlaj Nihalani, who died at 76. She remembered him as a producer who backed many films and artists, saying his contribution to Indian cinema will always be remembered.

articles.title: Pahlaj Nihalani Passes Away At 76, Govinda, Saif Ali Khan & More Pay Their Final Respects I WATCH
articles.description: Veteran film producer and former CBFC chief Pahlaj Nihalani has passed away at the age of 76 after reportedly battling liver-related ailments. Nihalani, who was admitted to Mumbai's Nanavati Hospital, breathed his last on Thursday, leaving the Indian film industry in mourning. Several Bollywood celebrities, including Govinda, Varun Dhawan, Malaika Arora, Saif Ali Khan and others, attended his last rites to pay their final respects. Watch the emotional visuals as the industry bids farewell to one of its most influential producers.

articles.title: Life Advice of the day by Tina Fey: 'You’re not in competition with other women...'-The Mean Girls star's golden advice that changes how we see successs
articles.description: Tina Fey advises that true competition lies not with other women, but with oneself. Her career exemplifies this, as she forged her own path in comedy by focusing on personal growth and skill. This mindset encourages individuals to strive for self-improvement rather than engaging in detrimental comparisons.

articles.title: No AC, no cooler: How a house in Delhi stays 10 degrees cooler even during peak summer
articles.description: A Delhi home remains significantly cooler without air conditioning. The owner's father designed the house with a central courtyard and cross-ventilation. Kota stone floors and air ducts also help. A terrace garden with over 200 plants further reduces heat. This approach saves on electricity bills and promotes a healthier environment.

By releasing toxic thoughts, we pave the way for emotional development and serenity, fostering a spirit that thrives on positivity and the essence of true freedom.

While the singer has a history of embracing fans, some followers questioned his judgment and its potential impact on his long-term relationship with Anna Kournikova. Iglesias previously addressed fan interactions, stating his partner is generally accepting.

articles.title: From Aamir Khan to Shah Rukh Khan: Ankur Warikoo reveals the Bollywood characters that taught him life lessons beyond the movies
articles.description: Entrepreneur Ankur Warikoo identified three Bollywood characters offering valuable life lessons. Rancho from '3 Idiots' teaches the importance of curiosity-driven learning over rankings. Arjun from 'Zindagi Na Milegi Dobara' highlights that success without fulfillment can be a trap. Dr. Jehangir Khan from 'Dear Zindagi' emphasizes self-discovery through reflection rather than direct instruction.

articles.title: Swaroop Khan shuts down death hoax after Google mistakenly lists him as dead: ‘Abhi hum zinda hain’
articles.description: Rajasthani folk singer Swaroop Khan has clarified that he is alive after a false death listing on Google sparked confusion among fans. The singer shared a screenshot of the erroneous information and responded with humour, assuring well-wishers that he is safe and healthy.

articles.title: How Taylor Swift built a $2 billion fortune through music alone
articles.description: Taylor Swift has achieved a staggering $2 billion net worth, becoming the richest musician solely through her music and performances. Her record-breaking Eras Tour, a concert film, and a prolific music catalogue, including successful re-recordings, have propelled her to this historic financial milestone. Swift's astute business decisions and generous philanthropy further underscore her remarkable success.

articles.title: Shakira opens up about her lifelong love for soccer as she prepares to make World Cup halftime show history along with Madonna and BTS
articles.description: Shakira returns as the face of the 2026 FIFA World Cup with "Dai Dai," a collaboration with Burna Boy that blends Afrobeats and reggaetón, with all proceeds going to children's education through the FIFA Global Citizen Education Fund. She will also co-headline the first-ever World Cup final halftime show at MetLife Stadium alongside Madonna and BTS on July 19 — marking her second official World Cup anthem, 16 years after "Waka Waka."

articles.title: 'Kyunki Saas Bhi Kabhi Bahu Thi 2' 3rd June written update: Rio and Niyati return to Shantiniketan with a secret revenge plan

Rio, seeking revenge for his father, vows to support his mother's return. Meanwhile, Hemant is shocked by Rio's arrival, recognizing him as Ansh's son. A roadside incident involving Vaishnavi adds to the unfolding drama.

articles.title: Fired '60 Minutes' Star Scott Pelley Accuses CBS Of Pushing 'Falsehoods' & Political Bias
articles.description: Former '60 Minutes' star Scott Pelley has launched an extraordinary attack on CBS News after being fired, accusing network leadership of pressuring journalists to include "falsehoods" and political bias in reporting. Pelley also claimed politicians were allowed to influence interview selections and warned that '60 Minutes' has lost its identity amid a wave of high-profile departures.
